ddls:
CREATE TABLE "articles" (
  "article_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each article */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the article */,
  "author_id" INTEGER /* ID of the primary author */,
  "journal_id" INTEGER /* ID of the journal where the article was published */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the article was published */,
  "issn_isbn" TEXT /* ISSN or ISBN number of the journal */,
  "doi" TEXT /* DOI (Digital Object Identifier) of the article */,
  "doi_url" TEXT /* URL of the DOI */,
  "abstract" TEXT /* Abstract of the article */,
  "keywords" TEXT /* Keywords associated with the article */,
  "article_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the article type */,
  "field_of_study_id" INTEGER /* ID of the field of study */,
  "department_id" INTEGER /* ID of the department */,
  "article_status" TEXT /* Status of the article (e.g., draft, submitted, published) */,
  "article_file_path" TEXT /* Path to the uploaded article file */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the article was added to the system */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the article metadata */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("article_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_articles_field_of_study_id FOREIGN KEY ("field_of_study_id") REFERENCES fields_of_study ("field_of_study_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_articles_author_id FOREIGN KEY ("author_id") REFERENCES authors ("author_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_articles_department_id FOREIGN KEY ("department_id") REFERENCES departments ("department_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_articles_article_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("article_type_id") REFERENCES article_types ("article_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_articles_journal_id FOREIGN KEY ("journal_id") REFERENCES journals ("journal_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "authors" (
  "author_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each author */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the author */,
  "affiliation" TEXT /* Affiliation of the author (e.g., university, institution) */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the author */,
  "orcid_id" TEXT /* ORCID identifier of the author */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position of the author (e.g., professor, PhD student) */,
  "department_id" INTEGER /* ID of the department */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the author was added to the system */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the author's details */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("author_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_authors_department_id FOREIGN KEY ("department_id") REFERENCES departments ("department_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "journals" (
  "journal_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each journal */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the journal */,
  "issn" TEXT /* ISSN number of the journal */,
  "publisher" TEXT /* Publisher of the journal */,
  "impact_factor" TEXT /* Impact factor of the journal */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the journal category */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the journal was added to the system */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the journal's details */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("journal_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_journals_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES categories ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "article_authors" (
  "article_id" INTEGER /* ID of the article */,
  "author_id" INTEGER /* ID of the author */,
  "author_order" INTEGER /* Order of the author in the article (e.g., 1 for primary author) */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the author in the article (e.g., primary author, co-author) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the author was added to the article */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the author's role in the article */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("article_id", "author_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "article_categories" (
  "article_id" INTEGER /* ID of the article */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the category */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the category was added to the article */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the article's categories */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("article_id", "category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  "parent_category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parent category (for hierarchical categories) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the category was added to the system */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_categories_parent_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("parent_category_id") REFERENCES categories ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "citations" (
  "citation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each citation */,
  "article_id" INTEGER /* ID of the article that received the citation */,
  "cited_article_id" INTEGER /* ID of the article that made the citation */,
  "citation_date" TEXT /* Date the citation was made */,
  "context" TEXT /* Context in which the citation was made */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the citation was added to the system */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the citation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("citation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_citations_cited_article_id FOREIGN KEY ("cited_article_id") REFERENCES articles ("article_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_citations_article_id FOREIGN KEY ("article_id") REFERENCES articles ("article_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "article_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version */,
  "article_id" INTEGER /* ID of the article */,
  "version_number" INTEGER /* Version number of the article */,
  "version_date" TEXT /* Date the version was created */,
  "version_notes" TEXT /* Notes about the changes made in the version */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the version */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the version was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the version */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_article_versions_article_id FOREIGN KEY ("article_id") REFERENCES articles ("article_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_article_versions_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., administrator, researcher) */,
  "department_id" INTEGER /* ID of the department */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user was added to the system */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the user's details */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_department_id FOREIGN KEY ("department_id") REFERENCES departments ("department_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "article_types" (
  "article_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each article type */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the article type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the article type */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the article type was added to the system */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the article type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("article_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "fields_of_study" (
  "field_of_study_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each field of study */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the field of study */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the field of study */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the field of study was added to the system */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the field of study */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("field_of_study_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "departments" (
  "department_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each department */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the department */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the department */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the department was added to the system */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the department */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("department_id")
)
